title: is this a bootleg or an unknown vhs release
display_title: is this a bootleg or an unknown vhs release
wikitext:
[]: is this a bootleg or an unknown vhs release?             Quote Post by CSManiac33 » Wed Sep 01, 2021 8:34 pm Someone shared with me images of this vhs and i cant find anything about it. The vhs looks like it has no labels but it seems to have all the proper rights on the back. https://www.ebay.com/itm/393544623848?h ... 5ba11666e8

[]: Re: is this a bootleg or an unknown vhs release?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Sep 02, 2021 9:31 am It’s a bootleg. No VHS distributor is gonna slap their video on an unlabeled FujiFilm tape. I wonder if that VHS is even manufactured for a tape length specific to the duration of the feature.

[]: Re: is this a bootleg or an unknown vhs release?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Thu Sep 02, 2021 10:51 am I have heard there are also Evangelion NGE/EOE Blu-ray set and DVD bootlegs of the series floating around, there was a massive boom in the 90's/late 2000's after ADV folded, so I'd just buy from Madmen, Gkids or Alltheanime now they avavible. Speaking from experience, I knew someone who got one, and they are not worth the risk, and they tend to have faulty discs that don't even play.

[]: Re: is this a bootleg or an unknown vhs release?             Quote Post by NightComesOn » Sat Sep 04, 2021 8:13 pm How is the seller asking almost $150 for this?
